steps.title: Read the visual context
steps.content: The passage describes moss, pines, cypresses, and willows as a vivid natural scene. The word gorgeous signals that display means an impressive sight.

steps.title: Choose the visual meaning
steps.content: Choice B means a copy, Choice C means affected self-importance, and Choice D means concealment. None matches the scene Mr. Bradford observes. A word meaning a striking visual show fits the context. The answer is A.
